//: Secrets policy: this committed file holds NO secrets. Real values come
from Key Vault (Program.cs wires AddAzureKeyVault with
DefaultAzureCredential -> Managed Identity in ACA) and environment
variables set on the container app.
Only env-shape constants live here today: the reverse-proxy mount
point. Adding to this file requires the same review bar as Trial.
//base-path: Backend serves under /photogallery/* in Production because the
nginx-appeid reverse proxy mounts PhotoGallery at
https://appeid.app/photogallery/. Program.cs reads this and calls
generation, and Request.Scheme reflect the real mount point.
DEPLOY-ORDER CONSTRAINT (epic #159): this BasePath-aware backend MUST
reach Production BEFORE the nginx-appeid PR that stops stripping
/photogallery from the upstream path. Otherwise nginx will forward
/photogallery/api/* to a backend that only knows /api/* and every
